MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property Located At 3546-3548 22nd Street, San Francisco To Richerson Farnsworth Or Highest Bidder
Off Calendar Jul-08-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Matthew Gluck Esq., Gluck Daniel Atkinson LLP, 415-510-2114, in-person appearance for plaintiff
Gerard Keena, Court Appointed Referee, 510-995-0158 via zoom
Dan Collin, with Partioner Referee
Terresa Gorman, with Partionaer Referee

Hearing Held. Mr. Keena informs the Court that there is no over bidder. Mr. Gluck informs the Court that there are changes to the proposed order.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

OTHER GERARD KEENA (COURT APPOINTED REFEREE) MOTION / NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING SALE OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 3546-3548 22ND STREET, SAN FRANCISCO TO RICHERSON FARNSWORTH OR HIGHEST BIDDER is Granted. Mr. Gluck is to prepare an order with all additional changes.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported.
